{/* Hero */}

🎓 Welcome to CampusConnect

Favorite space to connect – your digital hub for notes, events, notices, internships, placements and more!

Get Started Login
{/* About */}

About Us

CampusConnect is a centralized platform for students, admins, and HR professionals to collaborate efficiently. Explore your campus life digitally.

{/* Features */}

Features

Digital Dashboard

All your college info in one place

Internships & Placements

Students apply, HR/Admin manage posts

Notices & Events

Stay informed with real-time updates

{/* Internship Section */}

Internship Opportunities

Explore internships shared by HRs. Build experience and boost your resume early.

{/* Placement Section */}

Placement Drives

View campus placement opportunities and prepare for your future career path.

{/* Contact Section */}

Contact Us

Email: campusconnect@gmail.com
